---
title: "Mini-Project 01"
author: "Lauren Bautista"
output: 
  html_document:
    keep_md: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

# Data Visualization Project 01

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly) # For interactive visualization
library(viridis) # For colorblind-safe color palettes
```

## Data Exploration

```{r}
# Reading in the data
usbirths <- read_csv()
```
